hooks.prompt: Check what was just written. If the target path is under .claude/memory/ or .claude/projects/*/memory/: does this content contain structured knowledge (>500 words, wikilinks, domain reference material) that would benefit from typed edge connections and MOC placement? If yes, note this briefly — the content may belong in the vault via /encode rather than in memory. If the target path is under 03 - Resources/: does this new note have an up: field pointing to a MOC/index? If not, mention it may need /wire. If the target path is under .claude/plans/: this is a plan file — no advisory check needed. This is advisory — do not block.
